title: Section 3
content: The limitations and provisions referred to in section 2 shall be the following, namely:-- (a) in respect of dispositions by transfer inter vivos, those contained in 1[Chapter II] of the Transfer of Property Act, 1882 (4 of 1882), and (b) in respect of dispositions by will, those contained in 2[sections 113, 114, 115 and 116 of the Indian Succession Act, 1925 (33 of 1925)].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 21 of 1929, s. 12, for "sections 13, 14 and 20". 2. Subs. by s. 12, ibid., for "sections 100 and 101 of the Indian Succession Act, 1865".
